narrative:
North Royalton-05-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,007 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
